criteria.name: Pipeline completes exit code 0
criteria.evidence: Phase 7 exit gate tests pass (8/8 in 87.76s). cleaning.py previously verified in prior phases.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have hourly + daily CSVs
criteria.evidence: All 6 stations (cavendish, greenwich, north_rustico, stanhope, stanley_bridge, tracadie) have committed station_hourly.csv and station_daily.csv in data/processed/<station>/.

criteria.name: Stations with RH have populated FWI columns
criteria.evidence: Stations with RH data: cavendish (85% RH, 70% FWI), greenwich (10.2% RH, 6.6% FWI), north_rustico (11.3% RH, 0.8% FWI). Stations without RH: stanhope (no RH column), stanley_bridge (0% RH), tracadie (0% RH). Where RH exists, FWI is also calculated.

criteria.name: All 4 report artifacts exist
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json, imputation_report.csv, qa_qc_report.csv, stanhope_validation.csv all exist at data/processed/.

criteria.name: No gaps > 7 days in hourly data
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests (8/8 passed in 87.76s).

criteria.name: Continuous coverage from earliest PEINP to latest Licor
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests.

criteria.name: Manifest reports 0 unprocessed files
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json only lists greenwich station (86 artifacts). The other 5 stations (cavendish, north_rustico, stanhope, stanley_bridge, tracadie) are missing from the manifest. The manifest lacks a 'stations' dict or 'unprocessed_files' field. Ralph must regenerate the manifest to cover all 6 stations.

criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: Phase 7 exit gate passes (8/8), but 4 test files fail collection due to missing src/pea_met_network/normalized_loader.py (imported by materialize_resampled.py, test_fwi_vectors.py, test_materialize_resampled.py, test_normalized_loader.py, test_real_resampling_pipeline.py). Also 1 Phase 1 test fails: --dry-run flag missing from CLI.

failing_nodes.message: Manifest only covers greenwich station (86 artifacts). Missing cavendish, north_rustico, stanhope, stanley_bridge, tracadie.
Imports pea_met_network.normalized_loader which does not exist. Causes 4 test files to fail collection.
Missing --dry-run CLI flag causing Phase 1 test failure.

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: 6 of 8 acceptance criteria pass. REJECT due to (1) incomplete pipeline manifest covering only greenwich, not all 6 stations, and (2) missing normalized_loader.py module causing 4 test files to fail collection. The Phase 7 exit gate tests themselves pass (8/8), confirming data quality is good. Ralph needs to regenerate the full manifest and either restore normalized_loader.py or update the imports that reference it.
